run_date.description: ISO datetime when the backtest was run

pred_count.description: Number of predictions generated per test draw

avg_match.description: Average number of matches across all test draws

best_match.description: Best single draw match count achieved

three_plus_rate.description: Percentage of test draws with 3 or more matches (0-100)

random_avg_match.description: Baseline random pick average match count

tuned_weights.description: The resulting optimized weights object from this backtest

draw_range_start.description: First draw number included in this backtest

draw_range_end.description: Last draw number included in this backtest

engine_config_id.description: Reference to EngineConfig used as input for this backtest

weights_applied.description: Whether the tuned weights were saved and applied to engine

notes.description: Optional notes about this backtest run
